strengths: Hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role, showing early alignment with the domain
Proven distributed-systems depth: built low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Broad polyglot engineering background across backend, embedded, and frontend with consistent delivery across companies
concerns: No executive or engineering-leadership track record — no evidence of managing, scaling, or developing engineering teams of any size
AI/agentic work is recent and limited to tooling contributions; no demonstrated production multi-agent systems at commercial or financial scale
No meaningful fintech-infrastructure depth — credit systems, working-capital management, real-time risk, or compliance architecture are absent from the entire history
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong individual-contributor engineer with genuine distributed-systems credentials and emerging agentic AI exposure, but the role demands an executive who has scaled engineering organizations, shipped production multi-agent systems in regulated environments, and architected fintech infrastructure — none of which appear in his history. The seniority and domain gap is structural, not a matter of degree.
